introSection: Tumblin' Timbers, originally known as Twisted Timbers, is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group currently located at Land Of Make Believe in Hope, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was known as Twisted Timbers from 2020 through 2024.

fullText:
Tumblin' Timbers, originally known as Twisted Timbers, is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster built by Italian firm SBF Visa Group currently located at Land Of Make Believe in Hope, New Jersey, USA.

The ride was known as Twisted Timbers from 2020 through 2024.
